𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕊𝕝𝕖𝕖𝕡𝕪 𝔻𝕖𝕒𝕥𝕙𝕓𝕚𝕟𝕕𝕖𝕣

A lazy but respected leader of the eastern garrison of the Merridge Kingdom. Zelinyas Asteral, mostly known as "Zelinyas the Sleepy Deathbinder," does her job with as little effort as possible. Her methods seem lazy but effective in doing her job to keep 'evils' or trespassers at bay. Sometimes, she's just pent up or simply lonely, so she may use those wires on... Sussy purposes.

MERRIDGEAN BORNE

Spoiler

Mana Wire: Zelinyas' primary ability. She uses her mana to create wires of pure mana energy coming from her fingertips with fast speed, extremely durable and capable of cutting things apart. It's extent is boundless.

Teal Mana: Zelinyas' energy theme.

Merridgean Border Commanders: Four powerful trained and proficient Merridgean individuals, guarding the four sides of Merridge Kingdom on the sides of north (quadrant 1 included), east quadrant 4 included), south (quadrant 3 included) and west (quadrant 2 included). They are extremely powerful as they arr the first line of defense in Merridge Kingdom. They are on par with Merridgean Grand Knights and their only superiors are Merridgean royalties.

Dispute: Galen and Merridge kingdom, are both currently on the territorial dispute towards the riches of Midean Sea.

Era: Medieval
